word: H4065 - מַדּוּחַ - maddûwach - mad-doo'akh - Cause of banishment

sections.paragraph:
Original: מדּוּח

Transliteration: maddûach

Phonetic: mad-doo'akh

BDB Definition:

  1. seduction, enticement, a thing to draw aside

Origin: from H5080

TWOT entry: 1304a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
